inputs.fcf_source: Normalized owner cash per share after growth R&D and acquisition integration; FY2025 OCF ($283.2M) is ($0.79/sh at ~359M shares) and Q1 2026 operating loss ($271.5M) on revenue $64.7M (10-K FY2025 MD&A; 10-Q Q1 2026). Lawrence base uses a small positive run-rate path, not Q1 GAAP net income inflated by $1,057.6M warrant fair-value gain.
inputs.acquisitions_note: 2025: id Quantique SA, Capella Space, Oxford Ionics, Vector Atomic; Jan 2026: Skyloom Global (10-K Item 9A; 10-Q Note 3)
inputs.normalization_note: Base owner cash $0.08/sh assumes revenue scale and contract mix lift gross profit toward breakeven owner cash by year 7; does not credit warrant mark-to-market or NOL asset in Lawrence gate.

marvin_floor.notes: Normalized owner cash after integration drag; filings only

blended_best.notes: Marvin floor only; no approved third-party blend

bear.notes: Quantum hardware delays; integration failure; dilutive financing; competition from IBM/Google/Rigetti

base.notes: Contract revenue scales on specialized hardware builds and QCaaS; acquired Capella/Skyloom revenue embedded; R&D intensity moderates post-integration

bull.notes: Fault-tolerant roadmap accelerates; government quantum budgets expand; platform cross-sell across networking and sensing acquisitions

segments.label: QCaaS and cloud access
segments.evidence: Revenue from providing access to QCaaS services (10-K Item 7 revenue recognition)

segments.label: Quantum hardware and systems contracts
segments.evidence: FY2025 revenue increase driven by specialized quantum computing hardware arrangements (10-K MD&A)

segments.label: Acquired sensing, networking, and imagery (Capella, Skyloom, id Quantique, Vector Atomic, Oxford Ionics)
segments.evidence: 2025 acquisitions ~39% of FY2025 revenue; Skyloom goodwill $166.3M (10-K Item 9A; 10-Q Note 3)

options.label: Fault-tolerant quantum computing roadmap
options.base_terminal_rationale: FTQC pre-profit at scale; explicit zero terminal in Lawrence base after option scan
options.evidence: 10-K Item 1 discusses FTQC as long-dated objective; R&D $305.7M FY2025

options.label: Unearned revenue backlog
options.base_terminal_rationale: $64.4M unearned revenue at Mar 2026 modeled in segment growth, not separate NAV row
options.evidence: Deferred revenue $51.0M current + $13.5M noncurrent (10-Q balance sheet)

options.label: Federal NOL carryforwards
options.base_terminal_rationale: NOL is tax shield not owner cash; ~$653.8M federal carryforwards (10-K tax note)

corporate_drag.notes: Stock-based compensation and integration G&A; FY2025 net cash used in operations $283.2M

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill and intangibles from 2025 acquisitions; cash fell $537M Q1 2026 on deals while equity raised in 2025

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline?
option_scan.evidence: Fault-tolerant quantum roadmap; undeveloped qubit scaling path (10-K Item 1)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Unearned revenue $64.4M Mar 2026; smaller vs burn rate

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Privately-held securities in investment portfolio; purchases $2,757.8M FY2025 investing (10-K MD&A)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Cost-to-cost revenue recognition on long-duration hardware contracts (10-K critical estimates)

optionality_gate.notes: Cash $493.5M / 359M shares ~ $1.37/sh floor; does not pass dhando full at typical market cap

growth_explanation.mechanism: Contract hardware builds and QCaaS usage scale while acquisition revenue cross-sells across quantum networking and sensing stack
falsifiers: Operating loss widens for two consecutive quarters while revenue growth decelerates
Major customer contract cancellation disclosed in 8-K
Diluted share count rises >15% in 12 months without proportional revenue lift

stance_proposal.rationale: Deep operating losses and negative OCF despite revenue acceleration; acquisition integration and dilution risk; cash floor partial only
